records.ety: [OE. borage (cf. F. bourrache, It. borraggine, borrace, LL. borago, borrago, LGr. <?/), fr. LL. borra, F. bourre, hair of beasts, flock; so called from its hairy leaves.]

defs: A mucilaginous plant of the genus Borago (B. officinalis), which is used, esp. in France, as a demulcent and diaphoretic.
